name: @prune/known-knowledge
description: F2 — Known-Knowledge Negotiation. Replaces context the model PROVABLY already knows (stdlib, framework boilerplate, license headers) with a tiny reference stub, materializing the bytes only if the model fetches them back. The 'model-knows' verdict is caller-fed (an offline content-SHA-keyed equivalence probe), keyed by (contentSHA, modelId) so any edit or unknown model falls back to sending full content. Self-correcting: a fetch-back demotes the span. Deterministic decision core; no model call, no regex.
